公司名称: 中国国际金融股份有限公司
职位描述: 职位介绍 职责描述： 1. 结合业务需求，探索AI技术（如机器学习、深度学习、自然语言处理、计算机视觉、大模型等）在业务场景中的落地应用，推动应用系统智能化升级； 2. 负责领域内新技术、新方法的探索、技术决策、技术选型、技术架构和风险评估； 3. 识别技术难点，攻克高并发、大数据量、实时计算、算法优化等核心技术难题； 4. 对开发团队进行指导和培训，协调各方资源，持续推进架构演进落地。 任职要求： 1. 诚信正直、低调谦逊、艰苦奋斗，具备良好的道德品质； 2. 本科及以上学历，计算机科学、软件工程相关专业； 3. 5年以上开发经验，3年以上工具平台架构经验，有一定的团队管理、项目管理经验，熟悉私募股权业务且有相关工作经验的优先； 4. 精通JVM原理及调优、Spring原理、微服务架构及Redis、MQ、Nacos等常用中间件；精通SQL编写，MySQL或者PostgreSQL等数据库具有丰富的使用经验；精通数据结构及算法和设计模式。熟练掌握Python，熟悉机器学习、深度学习、LLM等的生态及算法，参与过人工智能系统及应用建设的优先；熟悉DevOps，熟悉CI/CD，熟悉自动化测试； 5. 热爱技术探索，善于钻研，自我驱动，具有良好的沟通能力和团队合作精神，具有较好的英文阅读能力，能够及时跟进全球AI技术前沿，参与前沿AI技术的探索与实践，推动开源项目在实际场景中的落地应用； 6. 通过基金从业人员水平测试或已办理从业人员登记/资格注册。 其他信息 语言要求：英语、普通话 行业要求：全部行业

岗位名称: 大客户销售经理（天然气AI数据产品 ）
公司名称: 六六云链科技(宁波)有限公司
职位描述: 职位介绍 【关于岗位】 千里眼是公司面向LNG产业链自研的AI4C（AI for Commodity）数据智能产品。我们以多源数据融合与AI模型为底座，为能源化工头部客户提供大宗商品领域的实时价格监测、流向追踪、竞争洞察及市场机会识别。候选人加入后，将深度参与国内首批LNG垂直领域AI数据产品的规模化落地，直接服务三桶油、国家管网、大型城燃集团等战略客户。 【岗位职责】 大客户联合开拓与商务成交 与战略合作伙伴（行业咨询龙头）协同，重点攻坚三桶油、国家管网及下属单位、大型城燃集团、LNG接收站等目标客户；独立完成从需求挖掘、方案呈现、商务谈判到合同签订的全流程推进，达成销售业绩目标。 AI数据智能的业务翻译与决策赋能 作为客户侧的业务翻译官，将千里眼AI4C产品的底层数据逻辑（价格预测模型、流向追踪算法、竞争格局图谱）转化为客户采购负责人、市场研判部门及高层管理者可直接使用的决策结论。不卖功能清单，而是输出采购时机判断、区域价差套利建议、竞品采购策略推演等可直接指导交易的智能决策报告，让客户将数据产品视为投资回报率可量化的核心生产工具。 招投标全流程管理 主导国企客户招投标工作，包括标书编制、资质材料准备、报价策略制定、投标现场组织等；根据客户规模与需求差异，灵活组合数据产品层级，确保投标方案的竞争力和合规性。 渠道赋能与销售支持 协助合作伙伴团队建立对千里眼AI4C产品的系统认知，提供销售工具包、行业话术及联合拜访支持，提升合作伙伴在中小客户场景下的独立销售能力。 客户反馈与产品闭环 系统收集大客户的真实业务需求、使用反馈及未成交原因，与AI产品团队建立高效沟通机制，直接参与模型优化方向讨论与定价策略迭代。 【任职要求】 全日制本科及以上学历，重点院校优先； 3–5年ToB销售或商务拓展经验，具备独立主导大客户成交的完整经历； 具备LNG、天然气、能源化工或大宗商品领域的实际业务经验，能够与客户进行专业对话，理解行业痛点与决策逻辑； 熟悉国企客户招投标全流程，具有标书编制、商务报价及投标实操经验； 具备数据产品或信息服务的理解能力，能够将AI数据洞察翻译为业务语言，无需技术背景但需具备商业分析视角； 自驱力强，结果导向，具备良好的商务谈判能力、项目管理能力及跨部门协作意识。 【优先条件】 具有大宗商品数据服务、AI数据产品或信息情报类产品的销售经验； 在三桶油、国家管网、大型城燃集团等目标客户侧具备现有人脉资源或客户基础； 具备渠道协同或生态合作经验，善于与合作伙伴配合推进项目，而非依赖独立抢单模式； 对AI技术在大宗商品领域的应用有基本认知，能够快速理解数据模型与业务场景的结合逻辑。 其他信息 行业要求：全部行业

职位描述: 职位介绍 1.深入了解AI GPU的硬件特性和全套软件栈的功能和应用场景； 2.沟通并掌握客户对AI模型和应用在GPU软硬件在各个层级的需求，依赖，和部署流程； 3.负责对客户进行产品介绍，演示，深入了解用户的需求，提供优化的应用解决方案； 4.对客户提供技术支持，在给类硬件平台和操作系统上部署和测试AI模型，直至产品交付。 岗位要求： 1.计算机/电子工程相关专业本科以上学历，5年以上工作经验, 其中包括1年以上的软件开发经历； 2.有多年以上客户技术支持和市场经验，包括芯片，服务器，以及人工智能应用相关产品的推广和落地； 3.熟练运用python，C/C++； 4.了解主流AI技术生态，熟悉Pytorch，主流AI推理框架和 AI Agent 的部署及模型调用接口； 5.有集群和虚拟化平台的使用经验 （比如Kubernetes， docker）； 6.具备良好的学习能力，沟通能力和团队协作能力； 7.从事过nlp领域或者科学计算领域者优先。 其他信息 行业要求：电子/半导体/集成电路,云计算/大数据,人工智能,计算机硬件,智能硬件/消费电子

岗位名称: Business Intelligence (Data Scientist) 商务智能 (数据科学家)
公司名称: 梅赛德斯-奔驰
职位描述: 职位介绍 Objective of Job Lead the design and delivery of advanced analytics solutions to support the captive finance business units’ initiatives, such as sales and marketing steering, pricing and commissions optimization, and customer delinquency forecasting/collections strategies, etc.. This role is both technical and business-facing: the Data Scientist will work with raw data, build statistical/ML models, create dashboards and visualizations, and translate results into actionable recommendations for management. Task Description Frame business questions with business units, e.g. sales, marketing, and operations colleagues, and use AI and Gen AI technology to translate them into analytics projects. Build, validate, and deploy AI models for customer segmentation, user growth, marketing channel optimization, pricing elasticity, delinquency prediction, and campaign response. Design and deliver evaluation frameworks and relevant reports. Work with Data Engineers to design data preparation, feature engineering, and model deployment pipelines. Present insights and recommendations to senior management in clear, business-oriented language. Support the other data topics if needed, e.g. explore GenAI application opportunities, support process standardization and automation, data security & governance related requirements. Mentor junior analysts and establish best practices in analytics and model governance. Qualification Master’s degree or higher in Data Science, Statistics, Computer Science, Applied Mathematics, or related field. 7+ years of professional experience in data science, ideally in financial services or customer analytics. Strong programming skills in Python, with solid experience in SQL and Apache Spark. Be capable to setup tailored environment and structure code packages are mandatory. 7+ years’ experience and expert knowledge of AI and Gen AI algorithms and data science methods such as Predictive modelling, Association analysis, Sequential pattern discovery, Clustering, Classification & Regression, Sequential pattern discovery, Clustering, Classification & Regression, Estimation, Descriptive analytics (esp. Data Visualization techniques). 7+ years’ experience and expert knowledge of typical data analytics and AI statistical algorithms (Decision Trees, Random Forests, k-means, SVMs, Neural networks, PCA, etc.). Proven knowledge and experiences of systematic tracking and evaluation business impact. Strong business acumen and ability to conduct workshops directly with business units. Excellent communication skills for management presentations and stakeholder engagement. Fluent in Chinese and English. Sound knowledge of Gen AI related technology (e.g. Deep learning, BERT, LLM). Having published papers in top-tier AI conferences/journals or having achieved good rankings in ACM/machine learning competitions is preferred. 其他信息 语言要求：英语、普通话 行业要求：全部行业

公司名称: 联想
职位描述: 职位介绍 The AI Training Project Manager will be responsible for designing and executing the company-wide AI training (AI Learning @ Lenovo). This role requires coordinating both internal and external resources to deliver innovative and impactful training programs. The ideal candidate will drive the development of course content, manage training initiatives, and continuously refine the curriculum to meet evolving business needs and technological advancements. List of Duties: 1. Develop and implement a comprehensive AI training plan across the organization. 2. Create detailed project plans and ensure timely execution of training initiatives. 3. Coordinate with internal teams and external experts to facilitate top-quality training sessions. 4. Collaborate with external specialists to design and develop cutting-edge AI courses. 5. Organize and manage both online and offline training events. 6. Monitor training outcomes and implement improvements to enhance the curriculum and training framework. Job Requirements: 1. Education: Bachelor’s degree or above, preferably in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Human Resource Management, Business Administration or related fields. 2. Experience: 3–5 years of relevant experience in corporate HR team training, with full-cycle management experience in training projects. 3. Language: Proficient in English as a working language with fluent listening, speaking, reading and writing skills to effectively communicate with international resources and conduct English-related training work. 4. Professional Competencies: Excellent training presentation skills, with experience in curriculum design, instruction and training program promotion; strong interest in AI technologies and application scenarios, with understanding of AI industry trends; at least one practical experience in delivering AI-related training projects, familiar with AI course development, implementation and evaluation processes. 5. Soft Skills: Strong cross-departmental communication, project management and problem-solving skills; innovative thinking and resource integration capabilities to drive continuous improvement of training programs; good teamwork spirit and ability to work under pressure, adaptable to a fast-paced work environment. 其他信息 行业要求：全部行业

公司名称: 特斯拉中国
职位描述: 职位介绍 The Role As the Product Manager for the SDS domain, you will primarily take the lead in shaping the product design and development of warranty and insurance applications. Serving as the primary IT product owner, you will architect and implement cutting-edge features that drive business expansion, all while upholding the rapid pace and adaptability that embody Tesla's ethos. Responsibilities Define and maintain a product roadmap aligned with Tesla's overarching objectives, prioritizing features based on market trends, customer feedback, and evolving regulatory requirements. Optimize existing features and innovate new functionalities to elevate application capabilities, thereby boosting warranty and insurance sales while enhancing overall customer experience. Partner with US IT team to execute global feature rollouts, with a focus on addressing and prioritizing local gaps for seamless adaptation. Work closely with UI/UX designers to refine the frontend interface and overhaul the customer experience for greater intuitiveness and engagement. Collaborate with the software engineering team to deliver end-to-end projects on time and within scope, managing multiple initiatives effectively. Harness AI technologies to elevate e-shop customer engagement and deliver personalized experiences that foster loyalty and satisfaction. Build self-service tools that enable cross-functional teams (e.g., Business Operations and Finance) to operate independently, minimizing dependency on engineering support. Continuously track and analyze key metrics—such as revenue and customer experience improvements—to inform data-driven enhancements and optimizations. Requirements Must have experience of leading end to end (E2E) warranty / insurance projects ideally in automobile industry, experience in designing core warranty / insurance purchase and renewal capabilities. 5-10 years' IT application project delivery and operation experiences in customer facing applications on PC/Mobile and Social/CRM applications. 5+ years' product management experience managing consumer-facing software products. Demonstrate strong organizational and delegation abilities, with a proven track record of managing product roadmaps and delivery timelines effectively. Strong product intuition with the ability to understand product architecture and effectively evaluate and drive design decisions. Proven experience in designing, developing, and managing robust program management tools and processes that drive efficiency and execution excellence. Excellent interpersonal, communication and collaboration skills with ability to work in a cross-function / region environment. Demonstrated ability to meet deadlines and commitments. BS in computer science or electrical engineering 其他信息 语言要求：英语 行业要求：全部行业

岗位名称: 医疗行业AI产品经理（央企医疗健康大模型与要素数据平台）
公司名称: 某北京大型云计算/大数据公司
职位描述: 职位介绍 岗位职责： 1.负责医疗AI产品的规划、设计与落地实施，确保产品精准满足医疗健康领域的业务需求； 2.深入挖掘医疗场景下的数据与智能化需求，将其转化为清晰的产品功能定义及需求文档； 3.统筹协调开发、算法、设计及测试团队，推动产品开发与迭代，保障产品功能、质量及用户体验； 4.参与产品上线后的数据分析与效果评估，基于数据驱动产品持续改进与更新； 5.跟踪AI技术（特别是大模型、智能体等）在医疗行业的发展趋势，推动新技术的应用落地，保持产品技术先进性。 任职需求： 1.3年以上产品经理工作经验，有医疗AI、智能体或对话式AI产品落地经验； 2.熟练使用AxureRP、墨刀等原型设计工具，具备优秀的产品分析能力和文档撰写能力，对用户交互及用户心理有较深理解； 3.熟悉AI大模型技术（如大语言模型、自然语言处理、机器学习等），了解其在医疗行业的典型应用场景及发展趋势； 4.具备完整的产品管理经验，熟悉敏捷开发与项目管理方法，能独立负责产品全生命周期管理； 5.逻辑思维缜密，具备较强的数据分析能力，能从数据中敏锐发现问题并为产品决策提供有力支持。 其他信息 语言要求：不限 行业要求：云计算/大数据,计算机软件

公司名称: 广州元魏坡科技有限公司
